creator: igor.arabesc.pavlov@gmail.com
text:
I've done source based update from the FreeBSD 11.2 to 12.0. I'm  rebuilding all of the installed ports now. Most of the ports have no compilation issues.

There are following miniupnd options:

CHECK_PORTINUSE=ON
IPV6=OFF
LEASEFILE=ON
PF_FILTER_RULES=ON
UPNP_IGDV2=ON
UPNP_STRICT=OFF
